name: ui
description: Flutter - Activity tracking application for monitoring foreground application usage
author: Flutter Development Team

scripts.start:python: cd .. && set PYTHONPATH=%PYTHONPATH%;flutter-app && pipenv run uvicorn flutter-app.src.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.mock:post:wait: wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && npm run mock:post && node -e "setInterval(()=>{},1000)"
scripts.start:desktop: npm run start:wait && npm run start:electron
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run start:ui" "npm run start:python" "npm run start:electron"
scripts.dev:with-mock: concurrently -k "npm run start:ui" "npm run start:python" "npm run start:electron" "npm run mock:post:wait"
scripts.dist: npm run dist:backend && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('../build',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:backend: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('taskkill /F /IM ActivityTracker.exe /T',{stdio:'ignore'})}catch{}" ; node -e "require('fs').rmSync('../build/ActivityTrackerBuild',{recursive:true,force:true})" ; cd .. && pipenv run pyinstaller --noconfirm --distpath build ActivityTracker.spec
scripts.dist:fast: npm run dist:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:installer-fast: npm run dist:backend && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64 --config.nsis.oneClick=false --config.compression=store
